name: IdsTableBkpExtr

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH cte_1 AS (SELECT * FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.@{pipeline().parameters.TableName} WHERE LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK < @{pipeline().parameters.LastRunCycle} AND to_char(@{pipeline().parameters.SRC_SYS_CD_Col}) = '@{pipeline().parameters.SRC_SYS_CD_SK}' AND CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK = @{pipeline().parameters.IDSRunCycle}) SELECT * FROM cte_1
